counter-border-color.$description: Material 3 color used by the avatar group component for the counter border: M3 surfaces carry no MarsUI bevel hairline, so the counter border is disabled (same decision as the avatar surface border).

counter-shadow.$description: Material 3 shadow used by the avatar group component for the counter: M3 has no avatar-group artifact and its nearest flat-surface conventions carry no glass effects, so the theme resolves the counter effect to a transparent level0 shadow (status.material3 precedent).
